events.title: The Fatherhood Huddle
events.description: The Fatherhood Huddle is the Autism Dads Social Club's virtual discussion series designed to encourage, equip, and connect fathers raising autistic children. Through conversations with experienced dads and professionals, participants gain practical parenting insights, emotional support, and a welcoming brotherhood where no father has to navigate the autism journey alone.

events.title: Back to School Autism Resource Fair
events.description: Join Autism Caregivers Around the Bend and Autism Dads Social Club at the Missouri City Community Center for a morning filled with valuable resources and information for families rearing autistic loved ones. Connect with local organizations, therapists, educators, and specialists who can help support you and your loved ones as you navigate the school year. We will have vendors, a panel, and fun activities to engage kids on the spectrum and their siblings. Light food and refreshments will be provided.
